name: Pass-through with field modification
description: Modify a single field value on an existing Epic table and pass through all other data unchanged

name: Output new JSON structure from Epic data
description: Read fields from an Epic table and produce a new JSON object with renamed/remapped properties

name: Upsert / command transform
description: Build a command payload that upserts a record using Epic EQ_LookupInfo reference pattern

name: Iterate multiple table rows (EpicData loop)
description: Loop over all EpicData blocks that match a table name prefix and emit an array

name: Conditional field inclusion
description: Include a field in output only when it has a non-null/non-empty value

name: AllValues pass-through block
description: Emit all fields from a table as Epic name/value pair array (useful for generic pass-through or debug)

name: Merge two tables into one output object
description: Combine fields from two different Epic tables into a single output JSON object
